message:
test: add unit tests for util.rs and config.rs (rust_proxy-2ni)

Add 35 unit tests covering:
- util.rs: parse_proxy_url, format_bytes, format_duration, format_timeout
- config.rs: infer_provider (all providers), ProxyAuth::resolve,
  Provider::as_str, TargetSpec methods, Settings defaults

All tests pass with cargo test, clippy, and fmt checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
